steps.description: Bioconductor's affy package was used for RMA normalization and raw data processing using default settings for background correction and normalization.
Cox regression hazards model was applied to the processed data using the survival package.
All analyses were performed using R software.

raw_text: Bioconductor's affy package was used for RMA normalization and raw data processing using default settings for background correction and normalization. Cox regression hazards model was applied to the processed data using the survival package. All analyses were performed using R software.
